name: Sandy 16x20 Garage Plan - A Porch-Front Garage Designed for Warmth, Style & Everyday Functionality
open_features: Perfectly sized for a compact vehicle, ATV, lawn tractor, workshop zone, or organized storage - plus a cozy porch ideal for seating, potting, or relaxation.
Clean framing, simplified roof lines, and easy-to-follow instruction layout make this design accessible for first-time builders and seasoned pros.
Warm, wood-tone doors with arched upper windows create a handcrafted, upscale look while allowing wide access for equipment and tools.
Cream-toned horizontal siding, white trim, and classic bronze lantern lighting evoke a warm, coastal farmhouse.
description_summary: Kickstart your next backyard upgrade with the Sandy Garage Plan - a 16x20 compact garage and porch combo designed for efficiency, charm, and versatile use. Featuring soft coastal-inspired siding, a classic gable roof, elegant lantern lighting, and a welcoming covered porch, the Sandy blends practical storage with comfortable outdoor living space. Whether you're building a small vehicle garage, garden equipment hub, crafting studio, or multi-use backyard retreat, the Sandy 16x20 provides smart...
